words.definition_vi: thực tế, trên thực tế (không phải 'thực sự' hay 'hiện tại'); dùng để làm rõ hoặc sửa lại điều vừa nói
words.definition_en: in fact; used to clarify or correct a previous statement, not simply 'really' or 'at present'
words.example_sentence: Many students think 'actually' means 'hiện tại', but it actually refers to what is true in reality.

words.definition_vi: cuối cùng, sau cùng (sau một thời gian dài); không phải 'có thể' hay 'có khả năng'
words.definition_en: in the end; after a long time or series of events, not 'possibly' or 'perhaps'
words.example_sentence: After years of hard work, she eventually became a successful engineer and achieved her dream.

words.definition_vi: nhận ra, hiểu được (bỗng nhiên); không phải 'thực hiện' hay 'làm thành hiện thực'
words.definition_en: to become aware of something; to understand suddenly, not 'to make real' or 'to achieve'
words.example_sentence: During the interview, the candidate suddenly realized that the job required more experience than expected.

words.definition_vi: hợp lý, thông minh (về quyết định/hành động); không phải 'nhạy cảm' hay 'dễ bị tổn thương'
words.definition_en: reasonable and practical; showing good judgment, not 'sensitive' or 'easily hurt'
words.example_sentence: It is sensible to check the weather forecast before planning an outdoor event for your company.

words.definition_vi: nhạy cảm, dễ bị tổn thương (cảm xúc); hoặc nhạy (về cảm giác); không phải 'hợp lý'
words.definition_en: easily hurt or offended; responsive to stimuli, not 'reasonable' or 'practical'
words.example_sentence: The topic of climate change is sensitive in many communities, so speakers must address it carefully.

words.definition_vi: về lâu dài, cuối cùng thì (không phải 'trong một cuộc chạy dài' hay 'trong quãng đường dài')
words.definition_en: over a long period of time; in the end; ultimately, not literal 'in a long race'
words.example_sentence: Investing in education may be expensive now, but in the long run it benefits society significantly.

words.definition_vi: tính đến, xem xét (một yếu tố); không phải 'lấy vào tài khoản' hay 'ghi vào sổ'
words.definition_en: to consider something as part of a decision or calculation; to include in one's thinking
words.example_sentence: When designing a building, architects must take into account the local climate and environmental regulations.

words.definition_vi: tình cờ gặp, tìm thấy (không cố ý); hoặc tạo ấn tượng (về cách nói/cách cư xử)
words.definition_en: to meet or find by chance; or to give an impression of being something
words.example_sentence: While researching, I came across an interesting article that completely changed my understanding of the topic.

words.definition_vi: điều tra, tìm hiểu kỹ (không phải 'nhìn vào bên trong' theo nghĩa đen)
words.definition_en: to investigate or examine something carefully; to research
words.example_sentence: The government decided to look into the causes of the recent economic downturn affecting small businesses.

words.definition_vi: gây ra, dẫn đến (một kết quả); không phải 'mang về' theo nghĩa vật lý
words.definition_en: to cause something to happen; to result in; to produce
words.example_sentence: The new technology brought about significant changes in how companies manage their supply chains.

words.definition_vi: đề xuất, trình bày (một ý tưởng/lý do); không phải 'đẩy về phía trước' theo nghĩa vật lý
words.definition_en: to propose or suggest an idea, theory, or argument for consideration
words.example_sentence: The researcher put forward a new theory about climate change that challenges previous scientific assumptions.

words.definition_vi: chỉ ra, nhấn mạnh (một sự thật); không phải 'chỉ tay vào' theo nghĩa đen
words.definition_en: to draw attention to something; to mention or highlight a fact or issue
words.example_sentence: The teacher pointed out that several students had misunderstood the main argument in the reading passage.

words.definition_vi: thực hiện, tiến hành (một kế hoạch/nghiên cứu); không phải 'mang ra ngoài' theo nghĩa vật lý
words.definition_en: to perform or execute a task, plan, or experiment; to conduct
words.example_sentence: Scientists carried out extensive research to determine the effects of pollution on marine ecosystems.

words.definition_vi: xử lý, giải quyết (một vấn đề); hoặc liên quan đến (một chủ đề)
words.definition_en: to handle or manage a problem; to address or be concerned with a topic
words.example_sentence: The novel deals with themes of identity and belonging in modern multicultural societies.

words.definition_vi: thành lập, lập (một tổ chức/hệ thống); không phải 'đặt lên' theo nghĩa vật lý
words.definition_en: to establish or create an organization, system, or arrangement
words.example_sentence: The government set up a new committee to oversee environmental protection and sustainable development.

words.definition_vi: tạo thành, chiếm (một phần); hoặc bịa đặt (một câu chuyện); không phải 'trang điểm' (mặc dù có thể)
words.definition_en: to constitute or form; to invent or fabricate; to reconcile after a quarrel
words.example_sentence: Women make up more than half of the workforce in many developed countries today.

words.definition_vi: diễn ra, xảy ra (một sự kiện); không phải 'chiếm chỗ' theo nghĩa vật lý
words.definition_en: to happen or occur; to be held or scheduled
words.example_sentence: The international conference will take place in Geneva next month with representatives from fifty countries.

words.definition_vi: về mặt, xét theo (một khía cạnh nào đó); không phải 'trong các điều khoản của'
words.definition_en: with regard to; concerning; from the perspective of; in relation to
words.example_sentence: In terms of environmental impact, renewable energy sources are significantly better than fossil fuels.

words.definition_vi: do, vì (một nguyên nhân); không phải 'đến hạn' hay 'nợ'
words.definition_en: caused by; because of; as a result of
words.example_sentence: The flight was delayed due to severe weather conditions affecting the airport's operations.

words.definition_vi: do đó, vì vậy (kết quả); không phải 'như một kết quả' theo nghĩa đen
words.definition_en: consequently; therefore; as a consequence
words.example_sentence: The company invested heavily in technology; as a result, productivity increased by thirty percent.

words.definition_vi: mặt khác, từ phía khác (để so sánh hai ý kiến); không phải 'trên tay kia' theo nghĩa vật lý
words.definition_en: in contrast; from another perspective; conversely
words.example_sentence: Social media helps people stay connected; on the other hand, it can negatively affect mental health.

words.definition_vi: ngoài ra, thêm nữa (để bổ sung thông tin); không phải 'trong phép cộng' theo nghĩa toán học
words.definition_en: furthermore; moreover; also; in addition to something else
words.example_sentence: The university offers excellent academic programs; in addition, it provides extensive scholarship opportunities.

words.definition_vi: tóm lại, kết luận (để kết thúc); không phải 'trong kết luận' theo nghĩa vật lý
words.definition_en: finally; to summarize; in summary; at the end
words.example_sentence: In conclusion, the research demonstrates that regular exercise significantly improves both physical and mental health.

questions.question_text: Many students mistranslate 'actually' as 'hiện tại' (at present), but in the sentence 'He actually passed the exam', what does 'actually' mean?
questions.option_a: He passed the exam in reality, contrary to expectations
questions.option_b: He is currently passing the exam right now
questions.option_c: He will pass the exam in the future
questions.option_d: He is actively taking the exam at this moment
questions.explanation: Bẫy: 'actually' không phải 'hiện tại' mà là 'thực tế/trên thực tế'. Nó dùng để làm rõ hoặc sửa lại điều vừa nói, không chỉ thời gian hiện tại. B, C, D đều sai vì hiểu nhầm thành thời gian.

questions.question_text: The word 'sensible' is often confused with 'sensitive'. Which sentence uses 'sensible' correctly?
questions.option_a: She is very sensible to criticism and gets upset easily
questions.option_b: It is sensible to wear a seatbelt while driving for safety
questions.option_c: The patient's sensible skin requires special care and attention
questions.option_d: He made a sensible decision when he felt hurt by the comment
questions.explanation: Bẫy: 'sensible' = hợp lý, thông minh (về quyết định); 'sensitive' = nhạy cảm, dễ bị tổn thương. A, C, D dùng sai từ; B đúng vì 'sensible' mô tả quyết định hợp lý.

questions.question_text: In the sentence 'Eventually, she became a doctor after years of study', what does 'eventually' imply?
questions.option_a: She might possibly become a doctor in the future
questions.option_b: She became a doctor after a long period of time and effort
questions.option_c: She is currently becoming a doctor
questions.option_d: She will definitely become a doctor very soon
questions.explanation: Bẫy: 'eventually' = cuối cùng, sau cùng (sau thời gian dài), không phải 'có thể' hay 'hiện tại'. Nó nhấn mạnh quá trình dài dẫn đến kết quả cuối cùng.

questions.question_text: Which sentence correctly uses the phrase 'in the long run'?
questions.option_a: In the long run, he jogged five kilometers every morning
questions.option_b: In the long run, investing in education will benefit society more than short-term profits
questions.option_c: In the long run, the athlete ran faster than his competitors
questions.option_d: In the long run, she walked to the store yesterday
questions.explanation: Bẫy: 'in the long run' = về lâu dài, không phải 'trong một cuộc chạy dài' theo nghĩa vật lý. A, C, D nhầm lẫn với 'run' (chạy) thực tế; B đúng vì nói về kết quả lâu dài.

questions.question_text: The phrase 'take into account' means to _____ something in a decision or calculation.
questions.option_a: put money into a bank account related to
questions.option_b: consider or include as an important factor
questions.option_c: physically take something into an accounting office
questions.option_d: record something in a financial account
questions.explanation: Bẫy: 'take into account' = tính đến, xem xét, không phải 'lấy vào tài khoản' theo nghĩa đen. A, C, D hiểu nhầm 'account' thành tài khoản ngân hàng; B đúng vì 'account' ở đây = xem xét.

questions.question_text: When a student 'comes across' a difficult word while reading, what does this mean?
questions.option_a: The student walks across to find the word in a dictionary
questions.option_b: The student encounters the word by chance during reading
questions.option_c: The student deliberately searches for the word
questions.option_d: The student crosses out the word because it is difficult
questions.explanation: Bẫy: 'come across' = tình cờ gặp, tìm thấy (không cố ý), không phải 'đi qua' theo nghĩa vật lý. A, D hiểu nhầm 'across' thành chuyển động vật lý; B đúng vì nhấn mạnh tính tình cờ.

questions.option_a: She looked into the box to see what was inside
questions.option_b: The police will look into the cause of the accident thoroughly
questions.option_c: He looked into the mirror to check his appearance
questions.option_d: They looked into the window of the shop
questions.explanation: Bẫy: 'look into' = điều tra, tìm hiểu kỹ, không phải 'nhìn vào bên trong' theo nghĩa vật lý. A, C, D dùng 'look into' theo nghĩa đen; B đúng vì 'look into' = investigate.

questions.question_text: The new policy will 'bring about' significant changes in the company. This means the policy will _____ these changes.
questions.option_d: bring forward to a future date
questions.explanation: Bẫy: 'bring about' = gây ra, dẫn đến (một kết quả), không phải 'mang về' theo nghĩa vật lý. A, C, D hiểu nhầm 'bring' thành chuyển động vật lý; B đúng vì 'bring about' = cause.

questions.question_text: The researcher 'put forward' a new theory about climate change. What did the researcher do?
questions.option_a: Moved the theory to a forward position physically
questions.option_b: Proposed or suggested the theory for consideration
questions.option_c: Delayed the theory to a future time
questions.explanation: Bẫy: 'put forward' = đề xuất, trình bày (một ý tưởng), không phải 'đẩy về phía trước' theo nghĩa vật lý. A, C, D hiểu nhầm 'forward'; B đúng vì 'put forward' = propose.

questions.question_text: Which sentence correctly uses 'in terms of'?
questions.option_a: In terms of the contract, we must pay the money by next month
questions.option_b: In terms of environmental impact, solar energy is cleaner than coal
questions.option_c: In terms of the agreement, the conditions are written clearly
questions.option_d: In terms of the dictionary, the word has multiple meanings
questions.explanation: Bẫy: 'in terms of' = về mặt, xét theo (một khía cạnh), không phải 'trong các điều khoản của'. A, C, D nhầm lẫn với 'terms' (điều khoản); B đúng vì 'in terms of' = from the perspective of.

questions.question_text: The flight was delayed 'due to' severe weather. What caused the delay?
questions.option_a: The delay was expected to arrive soon
questions.option_b: The delay was owed to the airline company
questions.option_d: The delay was scheduled for a specific time
questions.explanation: Bẫy: 'due to' = do, vì (một nguyên nhân), không phải 'đến hạn' hay 'nợ'. A, B, D hiểu nhầm 'due' thành 'expected' hoặc 'owed'; C đúng vì 'due to' = caused by.

questions.question_text: In the sentence 'The company invested in technology; as a result, productivity increased', what does 'as a result' indicate?
questions.option_a: The company is still looking for results
questions.option_b: The productivity increase happened before the investment
questions.option_c: The productivity increase was a consequence of the investment
questions.option_d: The company will invest in technology in the future
questions.explanation: Bẫy: 'as a result' = do đó, vì vậy (kết quả), không phải 'như một kết quả' theo nghĩa đen. A, B, D hiểu nhầm thời gian hoặc ý nghĩa; C đúng vì 'as a result' = consequently.
